tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall address
    edit "DNS_Resolver_1"
        set subnet 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "DNS_Resolver_2"
        set subnet 8.8.8.8 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "DNS_Resolver_3"
        set subnet 9.9.9.9 255.255.255.255
    next
end"}

tool_calls.arguments:

    edit "DNS_UDP_8853"
        set tcp-portrange 8853
        set udp-portrange 8853
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "DENY-DNS-TUNNEL-ALL"
        set uuid ac6a9af2-32b3-51f1-e183-8b928f35129b
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS_UDP_8853"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
end
